play.no_script: Please provide a script file: adv play <script.adv.md>

dev.desc: Start a local server for ADV.JS
dev.entry_prompt: Entry file "{0}" does not exist, do you want to create it?
dev.remote_desc: listen public host and enable remote control

build.singlefile_desc: Build to a single file, supports opening index.html directly

config.desc: Merge Config to a single file
config.merge_desc: merge config to a single file

check.desc: Validate project scripts, character references, and scene completeness
check.root_desc: Game content root directory (default: from adv.config.json or ./adv)

context.desc: Export project context for AI consumption
context.root_desc: Game content root directory (default: from adv.config.json or ./adv)
context.full_desc: Include all file contents (characters, chapters, scenes)
context.chapter_desc: Only output context for a specific chapter number

sync.root_desc: Game content root directory (default: from adv.config.json or ./adv)
sync.push_desc: Push local game content to cloud storage (COS)
sync.pull_desc: Pull game content from cloud storage (COS)
sync.sync_desc: Bidirectional sync with cloud storage (COS, timestamp-based)
sync.cos_missing: Failed to load @advjs/plugin-cos. Install it with: pnpm add @advjs/plugin-cos
sync.cos_install_prompt: Would you like to install @advjs/plugin-cos now?
sync.cos_install_cancelled: Installation cancelled. Run manually: pnpm add @advjs/plugin-cos
sync.conflict_detected: Conflict — both local and remote modified (skipped)
sync.conflict_summary: {0} file(s) skipped due to conflicts. Use 'adv push' or 'adv pull' to force a direction.

init.desc: Initialize a new ADV.JS project from template
init.already_exists: Target directory already contains ADV.JS files: {0}. Use --force to overwrite.
